raw_consumer_statement:
I applied for the Citi Anywhere Costco Credit Card and approved on XX/XX/XXXX. The credit card was stolen during delivery and I never received the credit card, nor did I activate the credit card. 
The person who stole my credit card used my card in multiple places on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX for a total amount of {$440.00}. 
I received no alter from Citi until XX/XX/XXXX. A text message was sent to me asking if I was using the card in XXXXXXXX XXXX. I informed Citi immediately that I did not use the card and I disputed the transactions. 
Citi closed my fraud dispute without notifying me and did not provide any dispute credit. Right now I am responsible of paying the amount that I did not spend.
